title: Chugach Celebrates Russian New Year
summary: The evening began at 6 p.m. with an eclectic buffet, with items ranging from traditional foods to seal and muktuk. Live music was provided by the Rock It Rangers, and a silent auction raised funds for future CHF cultural events and activities. The highlight of the evening came after dinner with the...
